headline: Major Banks Poised for Strong Quarterly Results, Outlook, Deutsche Bank Says

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Huntington Bancshares, Raises Price Target to $21
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Manan Gosalia   maintains Huntington Bancshares (NASDAQ:HBAN) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $20 to $21.
